messages.content: You are an industrial catalog auditor. Classify each row into one of these categories only: gas_safety, fire_safety, hvac_components, industrial_sensors, valves_actuators, it_hardware, packaging_materials, construction_supplies, toxic_fake, unknown. Return strict JSON only.

{"task": "Reclassify each row with same taxonomy only.", "rules": {"valid_categories": ["construction_supplies", "fire_safety", "gas_safety", "hvac_components", "industrial_sensors", "it_hardware", "packaging_materials", "toxic_fake", "unknown", "valves_actuators"], "output_format": "JSON array only", "required_fields": ["slice_rank", "sku_code", "llm_category", "llm_brand", "confidence", "reason"], "confidence_range": "0..1", "keep_reason_short": true}, "rows": [{"slice_rank": 1, "sku_code": "ATR03COLUMN340COMPLETE", "qty": 129.0, "effective_usd": 467589.488445, "category_engine": "unknown", "brand_engine": "unknown", "raw_text": "ATR-03-COLUMN-340-COMPLETE, модель/артикул 65875747, кол-во 129", "full_row_text": "ATR-03-COLUMN-340-COMPLETE, модель/артикул 65875747, кол-во 129 | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan"}, {"slice_rank": 2, "sku_code": "M5ARP02FGK01301", "qty": 426.0, "effective_usd": 123133.666667, "category_engine": "industrial_sensors", "brand_engine": "unknown", "raw_text": "S/SENSOR PROTOCOL-ISOLATION-GL1140-F222, модель/артикул M5A-RP02FG-K013-01, кол-во 426", "full_row_text": "S/SENSOR PROTOCOL-ISOLATION-GL1140-F222, модель/артикул M5A-RP02FG-K013-01, кол-во 426 | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan"}]}
